title: competition — published events
description: Every event is `ShouldDispatchAfterCommit`. Fixture + standings recompute events are HIGH-VOLUME on match day; RecomputeStandingsJob is debounced 5s.

events.name: CompetitionCreated
events.trigger: New Competition row committed with status='draft'.

events.name: CompetitionRegistrationClosed
events.trigger: status: registration_open → seeded. GenerateFixturesJob fires next.

events.name: CompetitionTeamRegistered
events.trigger: New CompetitionTeam row (participant enrolled) — with entry_fee_invoice_id set when kind=paid.

events.name: CompetitionTeamWithdrew
events.trigger: P1 event. Team withdrew post-registration — fixtures involving them are marked walkover.

events.name: FixtureScheduled
events.trigger: CompetitionFixture row created by GenerateFixturesJob (or manual).

events.name: FixtureResultRecorded
events.trigger: Score entered. status: scheduled → completed. Triggers RecomputeStandingsJob + BracketProgressionJob.

events.name: FixtureResultAmended
events.trigger: P1 event. Post-match correction. Full audit chain. Triggers full re-standings recompute.

events.name: FixtureWalkover
events.trigger: One team fails to show or withdraws. Score defaulted per competition_config.walkover_score.

events.name: StandingsRecomputed
events.trigger: Standing rows rebuilt for a stage. Broadcast to public league page.

events.name: BracketProgressed
events.trigger: Winner advanced to next bracket node. status: node → completed; child node gets team assignment.

events.name: CompetitionCompleted
events.trigger: Final round played. status: in_progress → completed. Triggers awards.

events.name: CompetitionCancelled
events.trigger: Cancelled mid-flight. All open fixtures marked cancelled.
